location.title: Search Location
location.description: Choose how to set your location. For **Postcode / Address**, enter a UK postcode (e.g. `SW1A 1AA`) or a town name (e.g. `Manchester`).

data_description.location_method: home — use HA's configured home location; address — enter a UK postcode or place name; coordinates — enter exact lat/lon.

options.title: Search Options
options.description: Configure the search radius, which fuel types to track, and how often to refresh prices.

data.cheapest_count: Number of cheapest-price sensors per fuel type
data.nearest_count: Number of nearest-station sensors per fuel type (0 = disabled)
data.max_data_age_days: Ignore price data older than N days (0 = show all)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your Client ID and Client Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Fuel Finder API. Check your network and try again.
error.home_location_not_set: Home location is not configured in Home Assistant settings.
error.address_required: Please enter a UK postcode or town name.
error.geocode_failed: Could not find that location. Try a full UK postcode (e.g. SW1A 1AA).
error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates — latitude must be −90 to 90, longitude −180 to 180.
error.no_fuel_types: Select at least one fuel type.

data.cheapest_count: Number of cheapest-price sensors per fuel type
data.nearest_count: Number of nearest-station sensors per fuel type
data.max_data_age_days: Ignore price data older than N days

error.no_fuel_types: Select at least one fuel type.
